_meta.test: cross-cohort domain-invariant / distributionally-robust representation learning (Bucket 3), LOCO
_meta.principle: ERM=pooled logistic; IRM=IRMv1 invariance penalty; GroupDRO=worst-environment robustness
_meta.interpretation: Invariance/robustness methods target the sign-flip failure mode directly. None recovers a transportable direction; all <= chance and <= ERM. Confirms no cohort-invariant tumor-intrinsic (or even immune) direction predicts ICB response at this n.
